title: Australian-Style Pilaf with a Twist
description: A flavorful pilaf dish with Australian twist and a hint of spicy mustard.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, heat the water over medium heat.
Add salt and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add Jasminder rice, and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and cook for 18-20 minutes, or until the rice is cooked and fluffy.
Fluff the rice with a fork, and stir in the pilaf and Mustardy.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the flavors are combined.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
